scope: 4-tier MONITOR brain cascade with Haiku-direct T4 fallback to api.anthropic.com
corrected_assertion: Brain cascade refactored into two distinct frozen configs: COACH_5TIER (high-stakes coach queries, 5 tiers) and MONITOR_4TIER (per-cycle monitoring, 4 tiers). MONITOR ordering reordered to put Haiku LAST as T4 (was T4 already, but now via OpenClaw proxy, NOT direct). Both new configs ZERO out direct calls to api.anthropic.com and api.openai.com — all model calls now route through OpenClaw with the operator's proxy key. The Haiku-direct fallback is removed entirely. Rationale: direct API key exposure in fallback path was an operator-key leak vector. OpenClaw proxy now has its own multi-provider redundancy that obviates the direct fallback. Commit 5a82f50 ships the refactor; commit #326 reorders MONITOR to put Haiku LAST as the slowest-acceptable fallback.
